examples: Is there really a way to categorize different types of students?
If you want to designate a period, you have to look at tangible things like pottery, particularly painted pottery, because it's easier to categorize.
Lindsay, like his films, is hard to categorize.
The Loma Linda researchers used a questionnaire to categorize participants into groups based on their diets.
As a society, we have come to rely on labels to categorize certain groups of people.
